release_review.summary: Introduces the first explicit Desktop and Runtime Service compatibility contract for the v0.5.9 release.
release_review.same_window_rationale: The v0.5.9 release adds explicit service identity and maintenance metadata on existing Runtime Service carriers, but it does not change the wire protocol semantics required by v0.5.8 Desktop or Runtime binaries. Older clients can ignore the additive snapshot fields, and the release gate now records the compatibility window for future challenged reviews.
checked_surfaces: startup report and local-ui runtime state carriers
Env App sys.ping runtime service payload
SSH-managed runtime bootstrap and attach flow
